copy.title: Spurs survive Game 7 thriller. Henley wins at Colonial. Nvidia surges while Tesla sinks.
copy.keyTakeaway: Spurs end Thunder in seven after a defensive grind. Markets stay flat despite Nvidia's surge. Entertainment side busy with weddings, firings, and box office wins.

todaysHits.sports: Spurs outlast Thunder in Game 7 Western Finals thriller.
todaysHits.markets: Tech mixed: Nvidia +4.1%, Tesla slides -3.3%, SPY flat.
todaysHits.golf: Henley finishes strong at Charles Schwab Challenge.
todaysHits.culture: Dua Lipa marries Turner; 60 Minutes reshuffles; box office booming.

markets.mood: Tech stocks did their usual thing today—chip stocks like NVDA jumped 4.1% while Tesla tanked 3.3%, leaving the overall market basically flat. It's the AI narrative propping up the indexes while growth darlings get hammered.
markets.whyBullet1: Your 401k probably owns a slice of all this through index funds, which means you're getting dragged along on the NVDA rally but also taking the TSLA hit, so the diversification is doing its job even if it doesn't feel like it.
markets.whyBullet2: Watch for any Fed commentary or inflation data in the next few days—if that lands hot, the rotation out of mega-cap tech accelerates and you'll see QQQ get tested hard.
markets.bringUp: NVDA is up 4.1% today but Bitcoin's down 3.5%—which tells you the AI crowd and the crypto crowd aren't really the same people anymore, and money's choosing semiconductors over digital assets right now.

culture.topic: Alexa Demie finally breaks her silence
culture.whatHappened: Euphoria's most guarded cast member sat down to talk publicly about her career and the show that made her famous.
culture.whyItMatters: She's been the mystery box of Gen Z TV for years — everyone watched, nobody knew her. That changes now.
culture.whatToSay: Dude, Alexa Demie actually did an interview. Yeah, that Alexa Demie.

culture.topic: Dua Lipa married Callum Turner in London
culture.whatHappened: The singer and the Fantastic Beasts actor got married in an intimate ceremony.
culture.whyItMatters: It's the kind of A-list wedding that actually feels private. Rare move.
culture.whatToSay: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner just got married and we're all finding out now. That's how you do it.

culture.whatHappened: Robert De Niro as a former president called back in to investigate a massive cyberattack on American infrastructure.

glance.sports: Spurs outlasted Thunder 111–103 in Game 7 to reach the Finals after a brutal seven-game West series.
glance.market: Tech split the difference: NVDA and MSFT up big, TSLA and AAPL down, SPY barely moved on a +0.1% day.
glance.bestConvo: San Antonio just won a Game 7 on the road against a Thunder team that looked finished three times. That's not luck.
glance.watchNext: NBA Finals matchup announcement and Game 1 tipoff details — Spurs are heading to the championship for the first time in years.
glance.quickRec: Russell Henley finished the Charles Schwab Challenge at -13. Golf's in full swing if you need something to follow besides the Finals.
